summary: Audited 39 block prompts (30 external B00-B35, 9 internal B40-B48). Identified quality issues, overlap patterns, and alignment with PLAN. Created comprehensive audit report with scoring and recommendations.

findings.plan_discrepancy: PLAN specifies 27 blocks but 39 prompts exist; 15 prompts not in final block list

recommendations.reason: PLAN specifies merge; B02 too sparse (89 words), B05 comprehensive (840 words)
Current prompt 'Risks & Opportunities' but PLAN names it 'Plan of Action'; only 151 words
PLAN lists 'Strategic Intelligence' but no prompt file exists
Only 94 words; needs explicit metadata structure for meeting classification
993 words with heavy semantic memory deps; simplify memory loading
1172 words; trim memory context, focus on trajectory tracking only
Add explicit external-meeting scope to differentiate from B40 (Internal Decisions)
Both risk-focused with high overlap; neither in PLAN's final list

merge_candidates.reason: Substantial overlap (both risk-focused), neither in final list

quality_insights.best_patterns: Clear trigger conditions, explicit output formats, quality checks, anti-patterns section
quality_insights.semantic_memory_overhead: B08, B09, B10, B12, B27, B31 require complex memory loading - consider pre-fetching

notes_for_orchestrator: PLAN discrepancy: 39 prompts exist vs 27 specified. D0.2 should focus on the 17 external + 10 internal blocks in PLAN, not all 39 prompts. 15 prompts not in final list should be archived, not refined. Critical: B28 (Strategic Intelligence) prompt is MISSING - must be created in D0.2.
